provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, compact cephalopod alien with dull grey-blue skin showing stress-pattern chromatophore discoloration from living away from their drift, two primary arms with three tapered digits, smooth bulbous head with large dark round eyes that look haunted, wearing scraps of what was once a teal circuit-woven Orryn vest now torn and patched with human fabric, data crystals that are cracked and dark instead of glowing, a human-made tool belt awkwardly strapped around the tentacle base, everything about this creature screams exile from a sophisticated culture
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

judgment.explanation: Sable Reach outlaw. Salvaged, stolen, and improvised gear. Nothing matches, nothing is new, everything tells a survival story.
